positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a vibrant celestial forest at twilight. The scene captures silhouettes of delicate, otherworldly trees with bioluminescent glowing leaves and glowing crystalline moss covering the ground. A majestic, glowing crescent moon hangs low in the deep indigo sky, casting soft ethereal light. The overall composition is centered and symmetrical, emphasizing the dramatic contrast between the deep blues and purples of the night sky and the glowing teal and gold accents of the flora. The art style should be highly detailed digital illustration, inspired by Art Nouveau and modern Scandinavian graphic design. Clean lines, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on fabric.
